summary: Replaced the 2D WaveField mode with a 3D RibbonField mode. The new mode distributes points along 3-5 seeded helical ribbon bands that twist through 3D space, rendered as THREE.Points with GPU shaders. Bass drives ribbon-wide undulation and radial expansion; treble drives per-point jitter and lightness sparkle. Added maxRibbonPoints to QualityProfile (low:200, medium:500, high:1000). All 20 new ribbon tests pass, mode manager integration test updated, quality tests updated, build succeeds with no waveField references remaining in source.
